arch: mamba-1 (S6 selective-scan), vanilla — no B/C/dt RMSNorm
serving_tokenizer_gguf: models/mamba-2.8b-tokenizer.gguf (gpt2 byte-level BPE, vocab 50277 = GPT-NeoX-20B tokenizer; 'The capital of France is' -> [510,5347,273,6181,310])

reference_verified.forward_math: Shares the mamba1_s6_step path proven HF-bit-exact on the real trained state-spaces/mamba-130m-hf (f32 == Q8, max|delta|=2.4e-7). This is the vanilla path falcon-mamba builds on.
reference_verified.quantization: Q8_0 residency, current 34-byte block format (in_proj len 27852800 == blocks*34). f32==Q8 argmax parity.
reference_verified.tokenizer_and_template: mamba-2.8b-tokenizer.gguf verified = GPT-NeoX-20B (vocab 50277). BASE completion model — chatTemplate MUST be 'raw'; 'zephyr' fragmented the absent <|user|> markers into salad (e.g. '2 plus 2 equals' -> '(E egal mITE': model semantically right ('egal'=equals) but detokenized garbage).

selective_scan.correctness_gate: GPU-scan argmax == CPU-scan argmax == expect_token; --gpu-selftest scan max_rel_err <= 1e-4 vs CPU
selective_scan.perf_gate: >= 10 tok/s warm on one L4, coherent output

note: Smaller sibling of the falcon-mamba-7b killshot; shares the Mamba-1 S6 path + the GPU selective-scan kernel target. Correctness proven; the scan is the only perf gap.
